cases.prompt: A/B 실험 결과 봐줘. 유의성 있는지, ship 해도 될지 판정해줘.

assertions.text: Produces a post-experiment readout with significance and confidence interval.
Flags traps like peeking, underpowered samples, or multiple comparisons.

cases.prompt: Calculate the sample size, MDE and power for a new A/B test before we run it.

assertions.text: Produces pre-experiment design with sample size / MDE / power.
